title: Parity: announce (Rust/Zephyr/Python)
description: Policy: three-impl parity. Module: announce. Rust: partial (247 LoC codec only in lichen-core). Zephyr: complete (495 LoC). Python: complete (1141 LoC). Gap: Rust has only message codec. Missing processor (gradient tracking) and scheduler (periodic TX) that Zephyr/Python have.
